mapper.select:
SELECT maintenance_item_standard_id AS maintenanceItemStandardId, maintenance_item AS maintenanceItem, maintenance_weight AS maintenanceWeight, maintenance_score_max AS maintenanceScoreMax FROM maintenance_item_standard WHERE 1 = 1
AND maintenance_item LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY maintenance_item_standard_id DESC

SELECT maintenance_item_standard_id AS maintenanceItemStandardId, maintenance_item AS maintenanceItem, maintenance_weight AS maintenanceWeight, maintenance_score_max AS maintenanceScoreMax FROM maintenance_item_standard WHERE maintenance_item_standard_id = #{maintenanceItemStandardId}
